entry.value:
{"viewModel":"siderbar","fullModeNewWindow":false,"skillIndex":{"skills":{"error-to-rule-memory":{"name":"error-to-rule-memory","description":"Use when repeated mistakes, review findings, or incidents need to be converted into durable engineering rules and reusable memory for future sessions.","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/baiabai/.codex/skills/error-to-rule-memory/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/baiabai/.codex/skills/error-to-rule-memory","directoryTree":"error-to-rule-memory/
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.77245894661E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7723831823922505E12},"lafr-bug-recovery":{"name":"lafr-bug-recovery","description":"Use when production incidents, regressions, or failing tests require a strict bug workflow that separates implementation defects from specification defects.","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/baiabai/.codex/skills/lafr-bug-recovery/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/baiabai/.codex/skills/lafr-bug-recovery","directoryTree":"lafr-bug-recovery/
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.772458946613E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.772383182395011E12},"model-safety-routing":{"name":"model-safety-routing","description":"Use when tasks involve mixed data sensitivity and work must be routed across internal and external models without leaking sensitive information.","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/baiabai/.codex/skills/model-safety-routing/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/baiabai/.codex/skills/model-safety-routing","directoryTree":"model-safety-routing/
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.772458946614E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7723831823977007E12},"sdd-riper-delivery":{"name":"sdd-riper-delivery","description":"Use when delivering a feature from vague request to merge-ready code and a spec-driven workflow is required to reduce context drift and review misses.","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/baiabai/.codex/skills/sdd-riper-delivery/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/baiabai/.codex/skills/sdd-riper-delivery","directoryTree":"sdd-riper-delivery/
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.772458946617E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7723831824001726E12},"spec-contract-scaffold":{"name":"spec-contract-scaffold","description":"Use when starting or refactoring a feature and you need executable documentation contracts that can directly drive coding, testing, and review.","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/baiabai/.codex/skills/spec-contract-scaffold/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/baiabai/.codex/skills/spec-contract-scaffold","directoryTree":"spec-contract-scaffold/
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.772458946618E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7723831824034258E12},"skill-manager":{"name":"skill-manager","description":"This skill should be used when the user asks to "create a skill", "update a skill", "delete a skill", "manage skills", "initialize skill git", "commit skill changes", "abstract a skill from conversation", "view local skills", "list available skills", "clone skill from git", "import skill from github", "import skill from gitlab", or discusses CodeFlicker skill management, skill creation workflows, skill maintenance, skill organization, or importing skills from remote git repositories. Provides comprehensive guidance for creating, updating, deleting, git-managing, cloning from remote repositories, and organizing CodeFlicker skills throughout their entire lifecycle.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/baiabai/.codeflicker/internal/skills/skill-manager/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/baiabai/.codeflicker/internal/skills/skill-manager","directoryTree":"skill-manager/
├── examples/
│ ├── complete-skill-template.md
│ └── simple-skill-template.md
├── references/
│ ├── git-operations.md
│ ├── skill-directories.md
│ └── skill-types.md
├── scripts/
│ ├── commit-skill.sh
│ ├── init-git.sh
│ └── validate-skill.sh
├── .version-1.0.8
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.772458946632E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7703463526379578E12}},"invalidSkills":[],"lastUpdatedAt":1.772458946632E12},"activeComposerSessionId":"44fbv8wecpau5wzldb4c","codeSearchSelectOpenFileHistory":[],"codeSearchSelectOpenDirHistory":[],"indexState":{"indexed":false,"indexing":true,"indexingProgress":0.01,"indexingMessage":"开始索引项目","lastBuildTime":"","pauseIndexManual":false,"status":"indexing"}}
